blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,732 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
